title: ICICI Bank International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Bank International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!
